questions.prompt: Which class handles a native HTML <select> dropdown?
questions.explanation: Wrap the <select> element in the Select class, then call selectByVisibleText, selectByValue, or selectByIndex. Select works only on real <select> tags.

questions.prompt: How do you click OK on a JavaScript alert?
questions.explanation: Switch to the alert with switchTo().alert(), then accept() clicks OK. dismiss() would click Cancel.

questions.prompt: Your locator is correct but findElement still throws NoSuchElementException for an element inside an iframe. What is missing?
options: You forgot driver.switchTo().frame(...) before locating it
The iframe needs an explicit wait of 60 seconds
iframes cannot be automated at all
You must call driver.quit() and start over
questions.explanation: Selenium cannot see inside an iframe until you switch into it with switchTo().frame(...). Switch back with switchTo().defaultContent() afterwards.

questions.prompt: Which method returns the set of all open window/tab handles?
questions.explanation: getWindowHandles() (plural) returns every open window's handle; getWindowHandle() (singular) returns only the current one. Loop the set to find and switch to the new window.

questions.prompt: After working inside an iframe, how do you return to the main document?
questions.explanation: switchTo().defaultContent() exits any frame and returns the driver's focus to the top-level page. Forgetting it causes later lookups to fail.
